html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Lamps Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Lamps emit light.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Lamps Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Fringe Lamp		 ×8 "A fringe benefit." deco_lamp_fringe

Stainglass Lamp		 ×8 "No stain on your reputation." deco_lamp_stainglass

Downbridge Lamp		 ×8 "Add some color to your light." deco_lamp_downbridge

Dual Embroidered Lamp		 ×8 "Roses, roses all the way." deco_lamp_2embroidered

Ceramic Lamp		 ×8 "Everything's coming up roses." deco_lamp_ceramic

Glass Lamp		 ×8 "Glass-ic." deco_lamp_glass

Dual Fringes Lamp		 ×8 "More fringe benefits." deco_lamp_2fringes

Candelabra Lamp		 ×8 "Light the flames." deco_lamp_candelabra

Elizabethan Lamp		 ×8 "Can belong to someone not named Elizabeth." deco_lamp_elizabethan

Gothic Lamp		 ×8 "Street chic." deco_lamp_gothic

Orb Lamp		 ×8 "Sphere-ious." deco_lamp_orb

Bellshade Lamp		 ×8 "A gloomier light." deco_lamp_bellshade

Crystals Lamp		 ×8 "Dire yet luminous." deco_lamp_crystals

Upturn Lamp		 ×8 "Uplifting." deco_lamp_upturn

Dual Upturn Lamp		 ×8 "Double the cones." deco_lamp_2upturns

Spool Lamp		 ×8 "A timber table lamp." deco_lamp_spool

Edison Lamp		 ×8 "Bare bones and bare bulbed." deco_lamp_edison

Adjustable Lamp		 ×8 "Accommodating illumination." deco_lamp_adjustable

Right Angle Lamp		 ×8 "Boxy bulbed." deco_lamp_rightangles

Fancy Lamp		 ×8 "A dash of gold." deco_lamp_hoofspa
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Lamps Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Lamps emit light.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Lamps Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Fringe Lamp
×8
"A fringe benefit."

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Đèn là một danh mục chế tạo độc quyền trong Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới. Tất cả các đèn đều phát ra ánh sáng.
title: Lamps Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Lamps.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Lamps Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. All Lamps emit light. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Lamps Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Fringe Lamp.png|32px]]
Fringe Lamp || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×8 || ''"A fringe benefit."'' || deco_lamp_fringe |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = A fancy lamp. |willow = A fire hazard. I like it. |wolfgang = Is fancy light. |wendy = A futile attempt to battle the darkness. |wx78 = LIGHT ACCESSORY ACQUIRED |wickerbottom = Perfect for a little night reading. |woodie = Yep. That's a lamp. |maxwell = A little light. |wagstaff = Enlightening. |wigfrid = I care nöt för such frilly things. |webber = It's a light. We could use one of those. |walani = Hey there, little lamp. |warly = Appetizing. |woodlegs = 'Tis a f'ncy house lantern. |wilba = 'TIS LAMP O' THE STRINGY BITS |wormwood = Light |wheeler = Nice enough light. |choose = wilson |source = when examining a Fringe Lamp }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Fringe Lamp Build.png|128px]] |- | [[File:Stainglass Lamp.png|32px]]
